name: 1D-Bench: A Benchmark for Iterative UI Code Generation with Visual Feedback in Real-World

description: arXiv:2602.18548v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Design-to-code translates high-fidelity UI designs into executable front-end implementations, but progress remains hard to compare due to inconsistent datasets, toolchains, and evaluation protocols. We introduce 1D-Bench, a benchmark grounded in real e-commerce workflows, where each instance provides a reference rendering and an exported...
author: Qiao Xu, Yipeng Yu, Chengxiao Feng, Xu Liu
